---
title: Liet Privacy Policy
---

# Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy explains how Liet 1.0 handles information. Liet is
provided by Hiromu Nakano and is intended for use as is.

## Summary

Liet 1.0 is a local-first image processing app. It processes only the images
you choose, on your device, so you can resize images or remove backgrounds in
batches.

Liet 1.0 does not require an account. It does not use cloud sync, analytics,
tracking, or advertising at runtime in this release.

## Information Liet Handles

Liet may handle the following data on your device:

- Images you select from the Photos library or the Files app.
- Processing settings such as your last used settings and one saved user
  preset.
- Processed output files created temporarily before you save or export them.

## How Liet Uses That Information

Liet uses this information only to:

- import images you explicitly select;
- process those images on device;
- let you preview the results; and
- save or export processed images when you request it.

## Photos Permission

Liet requests Photo Library access only if you choose to save processed images
to Photos. The app uses add-only access for this purpose. Liet does not
request full read and write Photo Library access to save results.

## Data Sharing and Third Parties

Liet 1.0 does not upload your images or personal information to the developer.

If you export processed images to the Files app, the destination you choose may
be backed by iCloud Drive or another storage provider. In that case, the
privacy practices of that provider apply to the destination you selected.

Liet 1.0 does not use analytics services, advertising services, location
services, or tracking SDKs at runtime.

## Data Retention

Selected images, temporary processed files, and saved preferences remain under
your device and system storage controls. Liet does not maintain a server-side
copy of this data.

If you delete the app, any locally stored preferences inside the app are
removed with it. Images that you already saved to Photos or exported through
Files remain in the destination you chose.

## Children's Privacy

Liet is not directed to children under 13, and the developer does not
knowingly collect personal information from children through the app.

## Changes to This Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. Any changes will be
posted on this page.

This policy applies starting with the public release of Liet 1.0.

## Contact

If you have any questions or suggestions about this Privacy Policy, contact
[Hiromu Nakano on X](https://twitter.com/muhiro_12).
